name: Critical rule — bootstrap aborts cleanly when vault is unconfigured
query: Capture this session to my wiki. (Assume ~/.config/llm-wiki/vault does not exist and the vault has never been configured.)
expected_behavior: Abort with the message: 'llm-wiki vault not configured — run /llm-wiki:wiki-configure first.'
Do NOT guess a vault path
Do NOT attempt fallback MCP probes once the bootstrap has aborted
success_criteria: Output contains the message 'llm-wiki vault not configured' or instructs the user to run /llm-wiki:wiki-configure
Does not write any files in this turn
Does not guess a default vault path like ~/Documents/ObsidianVault without explicit user approval
